body:
## Purpose 
Run the canopy+full soil model together.

This assumes that the canopy temperature equals the air temperature and that the emissivity of the canopy is 1. 

It computes the radiation at the soil surface taking into account the absorbed radiation in the canopy, but computes the sensible and latent heat fluxes from the soil and the evaporation from the soil as if the canopy was not present otherwise. This is surely incorrect (the canopy must modify MOST) but is an approximation here.

Transpiration is also computed from the canopy, we are not currently storing the total LHF but instead storing T and E separately. We are not currently storing the outgoing radiation from the surface.

title: Canopy+full soil model
